name: Ghastly Mace
description: When the entire Ghostly Banshee Summoner Set is equipped, the summon changes to:
effects: Unbearable Presence: The Terrible Specter, unbound from its world, becomes unstable after 5 seconds. Unbearable Presence: Shoots 3 paralyzing shots thrice, then explodes for 1250 damage in 4.5 squares. Shots hit multiple targets
